docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LANGENBORG NILS MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY TOW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00
